events.text: Son Heung-Min (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ki Sung-Yueng (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Oleg Shatov (Russia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Russia 0, Korea Republic 1. Lee Keun-Ho (Korea Republic) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Han Kook-Young.
Goal!  Russia 1, Korea Republic 1. Aleksandr Kerzhakov (Russia) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Andrey Eshchenko.
Koo Ja-Cheol (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for hand ball.
